name: wiper-query-system
description: 雨刮器查询系统 - Cloudflare Pages + D1

scripts.db-reset: wrangler d1 execute wiper_db --command="DROP TABLE IF EXISTS wipers" && npm run db-init && npm run db-import
scripts.db-stats: wrangler d1 execute wiper_db --command="SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT brand) as brands FROM wipers"
